extraction.one_line_summary: FROOME attacked 80km from finish on Colle delle Finestre, took virtual pink by 1:26 over DUMOULIN who limited losses dramatically.
extraction.winner: Unknown - stage winner not clearly identified in transcript
tactical_patterns: FROOME isolated attack with 80km remaining on gravel Finestre forces GC rivals to chase without teammates, unprecedented distance
DUMOULIN gestured to PINOT mid-climb coordinating chase effort, showing cross-team cooperation against common threat works even in GC battle
YATES cracked before summit losing pink jersey, suggesting his team isolation strategy failed when defending leader position under sustained pressure
CARAPAZ attacking at finish for bonus seconds reveals white jersey battle with LÓPEZ remains tight despite GC chaos ahead

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: sustained power over 80km solo on gravel at altitude shows exceptional form, willing to take massive tactical risk
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: limited losses to 1:26 despite solo Froome attack, strong chase coordination and descending kept GC hopes alive
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: lost pink jersey shipping nearly 6 minutes, team isolation strategy collapsed when defending race lead under attack
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: responded well to Dumoulin's cooperation signal, stronger than expected after appearing out of contention days prior
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: still hunting bonus seconds at finish for white jersey despite stage chaos, tactical awareness remains sharp
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: went backwards early on climb with no mechanical issue, lacking form at crucial GC moment
